---
id: app-finish
title: "Save the application at the end of the app registration process"
description: "Save the application after registering it on Bitrise and registering an SSH key (and, optionally, adding a webhook). With this endpoint you can define the initial configuration, define application-level environment variables, determine the project type, and set an Organization to be the owner of the app. Read more about the app registration process in our [detailed guide](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/adding-and-managing-apps/#adding-a-new-app)."
sidebar_label: "Save the application at the end of the app registration process"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Save the application at the end of the app registration process"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/finish"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Save the application after registering it on Bitrise and registering an SSH key (and, optionally, adding a webhook). With this endpoint you can define the initial configuration, define application-level environment variables, determine the project type, and set an Organization to be the owner of the app. Read more about the app registration process in our [detailed guide](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/adding-and-managing-apps/#adding-a-new-app).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
